title: Simple Mod Manager
description: This is a lightweight mod that allows the user to toggle mods, shaders, and resource packs, all in one place.
body:
# Simple Mod Manager  

## Overview  
> Simple Mod Manager is a lightweight utility designed to help players easily enable, disable, and manage their mods without the hassle of manually moving files around. 

## Key Features  
> - Clean and intuitive interface  
> - Press **F8** to open the mod manager screen in-game  
> - Enable or disable mods with a single click  
> - Automatically organizes and displays available mods  
> - Lightweight and optimized for performance  

## How It Works  
> 1. Launch your game with the Simple Mod Manager installed  
> 2. Press **F8** at any time to open the mod manager screen  
> 3. Browse through your installed mods  
> 4. Enable or disable mods instantly without restarting the game 
> 5. Configurable Whitelist: Secure your mod list via the "Configure Whitelist" button. This feature allows you to define exactly which mods, resource packs, or shaders a user is permitted to enable or disable.
>       - Use case: This is highly beneficial for modpack developers who want to guarantee game stability by keeping essential dependency mods hidden and un-toggleable, while still offering flexibility for optional add-ons.

## Why Use Simple Mod Manager?  
> - Managing mods manually can be frustrating.  
> - Simple Mod Manager streamlines the process, making it easy for players to customize their setup.  
> - With its simple design and quick access key, modding has never been easier.  

## Requirements  
> - Java installed on your system  
> - Fabric installed on game directory
> - Place the **Simple-Mod-Manager-1.1.0.jar** in your mods folder (depending on your game setup)
> - Important Upgrade Notice (v1.5.4): If you are upgrading from version 1.5.3 or earlier, you MUST delete the simplemodmanager_state.json file from your .minecraft/config folder before launching the game. Leaving the old file may cause configuration conflicts with the new whitelist features.

## Controls  
> - **F8** → Open the Mod Manager screen  
## Final Notes  
> - This tool is designed to keep modding **simple, fast, and frustration-free**.  
> - Enjoy full control of your mods with just one key press! 

## Usage Policy
> - You may include this mod in modpacks, as long as the modpack is hosted on Modrinth.
> - Please do not reupload this mod to other platforms or redistribute the jar directly.

## Full Spectrum Realism
> This mod was designed for the modpack **[Full Spectrum Realism](https://modrinth.com/modpack/full-spectrum-realism)** which is a carefully crafted modpack that enhances Minecraft while staying true to its vanilla feel.

> It adds **depth, realism, and subtle improvements** without slowing your game—running smoothly even on older or low-end PCs.

> Developed with **months of testing and tweaking**, it aims to enrich your world while keeping gameplay fluid and accessible.

> Perfect for players who want a **richer experience without compromise**.
